column1: # Published eigenvalues of the BRS combustor network model.
# The dissertation figure is vector graphics; coordinates are read from the drawing
# commands with the axis gridlines as calibration (residual < 0.01 Hz)
# raster digitization the values carry no pixel quantization.
# Growth rate follows the reference's convention sigma/(2*pi) with s = sigma + j*omega.
# 'sweep' points sample the eigenvalue tracks as the outlet reflection is
# lowered from the fully reflective open end (R = -1) to non-reflective (R = 0).
